results.evidence: listings/create.astro shows both options when no listing exists
listings/create.astro shows existing listing type when user has one
Create button hidden when hasExistingListing is true
Non-profit gets status='live' (vs spec 'published' but consistent)
products/index.ts line 148 blocks SKU for nonprofit
Non-profit has subscriptionStatus='none', grace period only for expired
businesses/create.ts line 189 sets pending_payment for business
subscription.ts line 103-105 returns error at limit

findings.title: Subscription status check produces confusing error for pending_payment businesses
findings.issue: The canCreateSku() function returns 'Business subscription not active' for subscriptionStatus='none', but this is also the initial status for businesses in pending_payment state. Users see a confusing error when they should see 'Waiting for payment confirmation'.
findings.suggestion: Update canCreateSku() to check if the business status is 'pending_payment' and return a more specific error message for that case.
findings.impact: Business owners initiating payment see confusing 'subscription not active' message instead of expected 'waiting for confirmation'.

findings.title: Grace period calculation uses inconsistent time handling
findings.issue: The isInGracePeriod calculation uses Date objects inconsistently, mixing Date comparisons with timestamp comparisons. This could cause edge-case issues in different timezones.
findings.suggestion: Use Unix timestamps consistently: const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) for all comparisons.
findings.impact: Minor timezone-related edge cases possible where grace period boundary is off by a few hours.

findings.title: Missing unit tests for subscription helper functions
findings.issue: Tasks.md specified src/lib/subscription.test.ts but this file doesn't exist. The subscription helper functions have no unit test coverage.
findings.suggestion: Create src/lib/subscription.test.ts with tests for canCreateSku, canEditBusiness, isInGracePeriod, and SKU limit enforcement.
findings.impact: Regression bugs in subscription logic may go undetected. Critical business logic without tests is a maintenance liability.

findings.title: Status value inconsistency between spec and implementation
findings.issue: Spec AC-US2-01 says status should be 'published' but implementation uses 'live'. The codebase consistently uses 'live' but spec should match.
findings.suggestion: Update spec.md to say 'live' instead of 'published', or update implementation for consistency.
findings.impact: Low - spec drift, no runtime impact since codebase is consistent.

findings.title: E2E tests are unimplemented TODOs
findings.issue: All 26 E2E test cases (us-001 through us-007) contain only TODO comments with no actual test implementation.
findings.suggestion: Implement critical E2E flows: nonprofit creation, business creation + payment, SKU limits, grace period modal.
findings.impact: No automated verification of subscription workflow. Manual testing required for all user stories.
